results.question: List the months and the total number of storm events that caused property damage greater than 1000.
results.expected_answer:
July | 319
June | 203
August | 195
March | 136
April | 127
September | 86
May | 76
January | 43
December | 41
February | 41
... (12 total rows)
results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?monthName (COUNT(?stormEvent) AS ?totalStormEvents) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-noaa-storm-events> WHERE {
  ?stormEvent <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-noaa-storm-events/type/StormEvent> .
  ?stormEvent <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-noaa-storm-events/pred/event_in_month> ?month .
  ?month <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-noaa-storm-events/type/Month> .
  ?month <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-noaa-storm-events/pred/month_name> ?monthName .
  ?stormEvent <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-noaa-storm-events/pred/damage_property> ?damageProperty .
  FILTER (xsd:integer(?damageProperty) > 1000)
} GROUP BY ?monthName ORDER BY DESC(?totalStormEvents)

per_seed.sql: SELECT "month_name", COUNT(*) FROM "StormEvent" WHERE "damage_property" > 1000 GROUP BY "month_name"

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table StormEvent: 10000 rows (from StormEvent.csv)
CREATE TABLE "StormEvent" (
  "event_id" INTEGER,
  "event_type" TEXT,
  "state_fips" INTEGER,
  "county_key" INTEGER,
  "month_name" TEXT,
  "episode_id" INTEGER,
  "begin_date_time" TEXT,
  "end_date_time" TEXT,
  "injuries_direct" INTEGER,
  "injuries_indirect" INTEGER,
  "deaths_direct" INTEGER,
  "deaths_indirect" INTEGER,
  "damage_property" INTEGER,
  "damage_crops" INTEGER,
  "magnitude" REAL,
  "magnitude_type" TEXT,
  "tor_f_scale" TEXT,
  "source" TEXT,
  "begin_lat" REAL,
  "begin_lon" REAL
);
-- sample rows from StormEvent:
--   event_id='1101283', event_type='Hail', state_fips='20', county_key='20_47', month_name='May', episode_id='180834', begin_date_time='09-MAY-23 18:00:00', end_date_time='09-MAY-23 18:00:00', injuries_direct='0', injuries_indirect='0', deaths_direct='0', deaths_indirect='0', damage_property='0', damage_crops='0', magnitude='1.00', magnitude_type='', tor_f_scale='', source='Public', begin_lat='37.93', begin_lon='-99.41'
--   event_id='1121833', event_type='Flash Flood', state_fips='9', county_key='9_3', month_name='September', episode_id='183581', begin_date_time='13-SEP-23 08:40:00', end_date_time='13-SEP-23 09:40:00', injuries_direct='0', injuries_indirect='0', deaths_direct='0', deaths_indirect='0', damage_property='0', damage_crops='0', magnitude='', magnitude_type='', tor_f_scale='', source='Public', begin_lat='41.7621', begin_lon='-72.742'

-- Table County: 2071 rows (from County.csv)
CREATE TABLE "County" (
  "county_key" INTEGER,
  "county_name" TEXT,
  "state_fips" INTEGER,
  "cz_fips" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from County:
--   county_key='20_47', county_name='Edwards', state_fips='20', cz_fips='47'
--   county_key='9_3', county_name='Hartford', state_fips='9', cz_fips='3'

-- Table State: 64 rows (from State.csv)
CREATE TABLE "State" (
  "state_fips" INTEGER,
  "state_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from State:
--   state_fips='20', state_name='Kansas'
--   state_fips='9', state_name='Connecticut'

-- Table EventType: 45 rows (from EventType.csv)
CREATE TABLE "EventType" (
  "event_type" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from EventType:
--   event_type='Hail'
--   event_type='Flash Flood'

-- Table Month: 12 rows (from Month.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Month" (
  "month_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Month:
--   month_name='May'
--   month_name='September'

-- Table Episode: 4584 rows (from Episode.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Episode" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER
);
-- sample rows from Episode:
--   episode_id='180834'
--   episode_id='183581'

-- Foreign key hints (join on these):
--   County.county_key -> State.state_fips
--   StormEvent.event_id -> County.county_key
--   StormEvent.event_id -> Episode.episode_id
--   StormEvent.event_id -> EventType.event_type
--   StormEvent.event_id -> Month.month_name
--   StormEvent.event_id -> State.state_fips
